subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast heard the beating of drums and the piping strains of the Concourse on High! Glorified be my Lord, the Most Glorious! Verily I [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سمع نقرات الناقور و نغمات الصافور من الملا الاعلی فسبحان ربی الابهی انی
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @firmness in the Covenant, @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
